title: PNumber Function
parameters: pointLabel	A point label used in the current point file or string expression containing a point label.
description:
PNumber Function

PNumber Function

See_Also Example

Returns the point number associated with a point label.
see_also:
PDef

PLabel$

PNumber Function Example

Integer pNum

String pointName$

pNum = PNumber(pick)

pNum = PNumber("pick")

pointName$ = "place"

pNum = PNumber(pointName$)
examples:
